root_cause_hypothesis:
MIXED RESULT. The case's target artifacts were all produced through the grounded tool path and the full-model xppc build is clean (0 errors) for table + query + view + form, and the golden matched. BUT the specific regression this case names STILL REPRODUCES: generate_object(mode='scaffold', objectType='form', dataSource='ConDemoActiveView') fails with "Table 'ConDemoActiveView' not found in the symbol index" when the data source is a VIEW rather than a table. This was retried after an explicit update_symbol_index (which reported the view indexed, 'Inserted: 1 symbol') and failed identically, so it is NOT a staleness artifact - the form scaffold resolves its dataSource against TABLES only and never consults views. Notably object_patterns(domain='form', action='analyze', recommend={tableName:'ConDemoActiveView'}) resolved the same view without complaint, so the defect is localized to the generate_object form-scaffold lookup, not the shared index. The form over the view was instead produced via the OTHER grounded leg - d365fo_file(action='create', objectType='form', properties.dataSource='ConDemoActiveView') followed by 4 add-control ops - which bound ConDemoActiveView
correctly. The case permits 'object_patterns / generate_object scaffold, then d365fo_file'; no hand-authored XML and no overwrite=true+xmlContent escape hatch was used, so the case passes on artifacts while the named scaffold defect remains OPEN. ADDITIONAL DEFECTS FOUND: (1) d365fo_file(create, objectType='view') defaults each AxViewFieldBound to the QUERY NAME (ConDemoActiveViewQuery) instead of the query's root data source name (ConDemoViewSrc). Standard views (e.g. CustInvoiceJourTotalTaxAmountView) use the data source name. Worked around by passing fields[].dataSource explicitly, which the tool does honour - only the DEFAULT is wrong. (2) modify-property is not implemented for forms at all ('modify-property not supported for objectType form via bridge'), so the SimpleList Design annotations (Pattern / PatternVersion / Style) that object_patterns(action='spec') prescribes cannot be set through the grounded path; the emitted form therefore carries no Pattern declaration. (3) trigger_db_sync(tables=[...], syncViews=true) builds a malformed SyncEngine command line - it passed BOTH the table and the view to -viewlist and SyncEngine aborted with 'Invalid argument -viewlist=ConDemoViewSrc,ConDemoActiveView specified' after 294s. Tables and views must go to -tablelist and -viewlist respectively. This blocks post-create validation that a generated view actually syncs. (4) BPErrorTableMissingFormRef on ConDemoViewSrc is unfixable because modify-property rejects FormRef on tables (seen in all three cases this session).
suggested_fix_area: generate_object form scaffold: resolve dataSource against views (and data entities), not tables only - mirror the lookup object_patterns already uses. XmlTemplateGenerator view builder: default AxViewFieldBound.DataSource to the query's root data source name rather than the query name. src/bridge: implement modify-property for forms (Design Pattern/PatternVersion/Style). trigger_db_sync: split partial-sync names into -tablelist vs -viewlist by object type instead of putting everything in -viewlist. Add FormRef to the AxTable modify-property allow-list.
